--- title: Dimensionality reduction keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "Contains classes to perform dimensionality reduction, including UMAP and PCA." description: "Contains classes to perform dimensionality reduction, including UMAP and PCA." nb_path: "dimensionality_reduction.ipynb" ---

{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
%load_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2

The autoreload extension is already loaded. To reload it, use:
  %reload_ext autoreload
{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %}

class BaseTransform[source]

BaseTransform()

Base class to perform dimensionality reduction on a dataset.

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

class UMAPTransform[source]

UMAPTransform(dataset:array) :: BaseTransform

Calculate UMAP embeddings

{% endraw %} {% raw %}

class PCATransform[source]

PCATransform(dataset:array) :: BaseTransform

Calculate UMAP embeddings

{% endraw %} {% raw %}
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
data=np.random.rand(100,100)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
transformer = UMAPTransform(data)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
embeddings = transformer.reduce(n_components=2)
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
embeddings[0:5]

array([[ 3.4216092,  2.8054807],
       [ 1.5676728, -0.8684107],
       [ 2.0159667, -2.2172773],
       [ 3.3400257,  1.7845361],
       [ 2.9045517, -0.9596286]], dtype=float32)
{% endraw %}
